ELPAC Level 2
NWEA 1300–1400L
DTR  |  Listen to a Classroom Conversation
LCC-MS6-L2-13001400-MSELA6-ESC-LAT-01 • MS6 MSELA6 • Character Response and Change

The Locked Mercado

Click  🎧  to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a girl and a boy. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer some questions.
Listen to the Conversation
1QUESTION 1: What does the boy's character end up doing in the escape room story?
2QUESTION 2: Why did the boy's character change his mind?
3QUESTION 3: What will the students probably do next?
Choose the best answer for each question. You may change your answers before submitting.
Answer all 3 questions to submit.
SMART SUPPORT:
Go back to the conversation. Why does the girl frame the clue answer the way she does, and why does the boy explain what changed for him? How do their reasons fit together across the conversation?
CA ELD PI.A.1, PI.A.3, PI.B.5  |  CCSS RL.6.3  |  MS ELA Grade 6: Character Response and Change
